org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: So Plush Plumper Lip Gloss (GWP)
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: So Plush Plumper Lip Gloss (GWP)
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: Looking to enhance the volume and fullness of your lips, naturally? Infused with hydrating oils and nourishing skincare-inspired ingredients, Julep’s smooth So Plush Plumper Lip Gloss delivers sheer, shiny color that boosts your pout. The signature Maxilip plumping complex helps to gently boost your pout for results you can see instantly.

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: So Plush Plumper Lip Gloss (GWP)
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: So Plush Plumper Lip Gloss (GWP)

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: Inner Radiance Shimmering Eyeshadow Set (3 PC)
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: Inner Radiance Shimmering Eyeshadow Set (3 PC)
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: This 3PC kit includes all you need to easily enhance your eyes for an enhanced, natural look for everyday. It features two beautiful Eyeshadow 101 shades that apply and blend like a dream, along with a fan-fave mascara for instantly longer lashes.

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: 6 PC Eyeshadow 101 Crème-to-Powder Waterproof Eyeshadow Stick
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: 6 PC Eyeshadow 101 Crème-to-Powder Waterproof Eyeshadow Stick
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: Choose your favorite 6 pc set! No brush required when using this pigment-packed formula that glides effortlessly across lids before drying to a waterproof powder finish. how to use: Sweep directly across lids. Blend with fingers or the built-in smudger before the formula sets. For best results, prime the smudger by coating it with color prior to use.

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: 6 PC Eyeshadow 101 Crème-to-Powder Waterproof Eyeshadow Stick - Matte Magic
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: 6 PC Eyeshadow 101 Crème-to-Powder Waterproof Eyeshadow Stick - Matte Magic

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: 6 PC Eyeshadow 101 Crème-to-Powder Waterproof Eyeshadow Stick - Garden Party
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: 6 PC Eyeshadow 101 Crème-to-Powder Waterproof Eyeshadow Stick - Garden Party

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: 6 PC Eyeshadow 101 Crème-to-Powder Waterproof Eyeshadow Stick - Bold Basics
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: 6 PC Eyeshadow 101 Crème-to-Powder Waterproof Eyeshadow Stick - Bold Basics

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: The Perfect Pair Duo
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: The Perfect Pair Duo
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: Define, hydrate, and perfect your pout with this effortless lip duo. Start with the With a Trace Retractable Lip Liner to shape and lock in color, then glide on It’s Balm Lip Crayon for smooth, full-coverage color with a moisturizing, balm-like feel. Together, they deliver long-lasting definition and comfortable, hydrated lips in just a few swipes.

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: The Perfect Pair Duo - Canyon Rose + Antique Rose
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: The Perfect Pair Duo - Canyon Rose + Antique Rose

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: It’s Balm Moisturizing Lip Color Trios
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: It’s Balm Moisturizing Lip Color Trios
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: Creamy, full-coverage lip crayon with a hydrating core that moisturizes and conditions lips. Sunflower butter + vitamin E nourish lips while ultra-fine pigments give bold color and a smooth semi-gloss shine.

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: So Plush Glossy Lip Oil (Rosy Glow)
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: So Plush Glossy Lip Oil (Rosy Glow)
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: Use this sheer, nourishing formula to help revitalize dry lips while moisturizing with skin-friendly botanical oils.

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: So Plush Glossy Lip Oil (Rosy Glow)
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: So Plush Glossy Lip Oil (Rosy Glow)

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: Length Matters Mascara
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: Length Matters Mascara
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: A buildable, jet black mascara with an extreme lengthening formula that coats lashes from root to tip. The unique, finely tapered micro-bristle brush defines individual lashes and layers for a softly curled, wide-eyed look that stretches the limits. To use: Start at the base of your lash line, and pull wand upward smoothly without wiggling. Repeat, applying additional coats until you achieve your desired look. 0.35 oz, 10.1 g

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: Length Matters Mascara
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: Length Matters Mascara
